title: Screen Mirror Shader
description: A shader that allows you to rotate the image in the game vertically, horizontally and more
body:
# Screen Mirror Shader 🪞

### **🔔 Note: Only the visuals are mirrored. Player controls and UI remain normal — your movement will not be reversed.**

**Screen Mirror Shader** adds customizable horizontal and vertical mirroring effects to your Minecraft visuals. Whether you're aiming for artistic screenshots, experimental gameplay visuals, or simply want to play in a fully mirrored world — this shader gives you full control over how the screen is reflected.

## 🖼️ Preview
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ab4d206f2b1d49e185dc7b49a62739c2178d62e.png)

## ✨ Features
🔁 Horizontal Symmetry
Mirror the screen from right to left, or across the center axis.

🔃 Vertical Symmetry
Mirror the screen from bottom to top, or across the center axis.

🧩 Combine Symmetry Modes
Horizontal and vertical mirroring modes can be combined freely for unique visuals.

## ❓How it works
### No mirroring
![No mirroring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c506743d007c94e0396d8d7ecdbb7a4f1dd995f2.png)

### Horizontal mirror across the entire screen
![Horizontal mirror across the entire screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b37362b8950bdbc5b8559812f517c47e492d8aaf.png)

### Mirrors across the vertical center
![Mirrors across the vertical center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75914a1c9eea46bf8104e29b629d88d6b637e2fe.png)

### Vertical mirror across the full screen
![Vertical mirror across the full screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d334de9407c7acd7d54a1b547c8bb0b09cabb9e6.png)

### Mirrors across the horizontal center
![Mirrors across the horizontal center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34220eeee748f33a91004fd5658e14a96835612e.png)

## ⚙️ Installation
1. Install Iris or OptiFine.
2. Download and place the shader pack into your shaderpacks folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and select the shader in the options menu.
4. Adjust symmetry settings in the shader options to your preference.

## 📄 License
Released under the MIT License. You are free to modify, distribute, or include this shader in larger shaderpacks or modpacks.
